_note: Sextant session hooks for Claude Code. Copy the hooks array entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json or <project>/.claude/settings.json. Do NOT enable these in the Sextant repo itself — they are intended for projects that use Sextant.

_enforcement_levels.advisory: Warnings only. Never blocks actions. Default level.
_enforcement_levels.team: Blocks git commit when build review is missing. Allows other actions.
_enforcement_levels.strict: Blocks git commit when review is missing AND when scope_creep_flags are unresolved.

hooks_advisory._comment: ADVISORY level — paste these entries into the 'hooks' array in settings.json

hooks.command: INCOMPLETE=""; for d in .sextant/traces/*/; do if [ -f "${d}build-summary.md" ] && [ ! -f "${d}review-build.md" ]; then INCOMPLETE="$INCOMPLETE $(basename $d)"; fi; done; if [ -n "$INCOMPLETE" ]; then echo ''; echo '[Sextant] Incomplete build tasks:' $INCOMPLETE; echo '  Run /sextant or /sextant-verify to complete verification before closing.'; echo ''; fi

IS_COMMIT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if 'git commit' in d.get('command','') else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo yes || echo no); if [ "$IS_COMMIT" = "yes" ]; then TASK_DIR=$(ls -dt .sextant/traces/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$TASK_DIR" ]; then REVIEW="${TASK_DIR}review-build.md"; if [ ! -f "$REVIEW" ]; then echo '[Sextant] WARNING: No build review found for task '$(basename $TASK_DIR)'. Run /sextant-verify before committing.'; elif ! grep -q 'deletion_proposals' "$REVIEW"; then echo '[Sextant] WARNING: review-build.md is missing deletion_proposals. Review artifact may be malformed.'; fi; fi; fi

hooks_team._comment: TEAM level — blocks git commit when build review is missing. Warnings only for other checks.

hooks.command: INCOMPLETE=""; for d in .sextant/traces/*/; do if [ -f "${d}build-summary.md" ] && [ ! -f "${d}review-build.md" ]; then INCOMPLETE="$INCOMPLETE $(basename $d)"; fi; done; if [ -n "$INCOMPLETE" ]; then echo ''; echo '[Sextant] Incomplete build tasks:' $INCOMPLETE; echo '  Run /sextant or /sextant-verify to complete verification before closing.'; echo ''; fi

IS_COMMIT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if 'git commit' in d.get('command','') else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo yes || echo no); if [ "$IS_COMMIT" = "yes" ]; then TASK_DIR=$(ls -dt .sextant/traces/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$TASK_DIR" ]; then REVIEW="${TASK_DIR}review-build.md"; if [ ! -f "$REVIEW" ]; then echo '[Sextant] BLOCKED: No build review found for task '$(basename $TASK_DIR)'. Run /sextant-verify before committing.'; exit 2; elif ! grep -q 'deletion_proposals' "$REVIEW"; then echo '[Sextant] WARNING: review-build.md is missing deletion_proposals. Review artifact may be malformed.'; fi; fi; fi

hooks_strict._comment: STRICT level — blocks git commit when review is missing OR when scope_creep_flags are unresolved.

hooks.command: INCOMPLETE=""; for d in .sextant/traces/*/; do if [ -f "${d}build-summary.md" ] && [ ! -f "${d}review-build.md" ]; then INCOMPLETE="$INCOMPLETE $(basename $d)"; fi; done; if [ -n "$INCOMPLETE" ]; then echo ''; echo '[Sextant] Incomplete build tasks:' $INCOMPLETE; echo '  Run /sextant or /sextant-verify to complete verification before closing.'; echo ''; fi

IS_COMMIT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if 'git commit' in d.get('command','') else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo yes || echo no); if [ "$IS_COMMIT" = "yes" ]; then TASK_DIR=$(ls -dt .sextant/traces/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$TASK_DIR" ]; then REVIEW="${TASK_DIR}review-build.md"; if [ ! -f "$REVIEW" ]; then echo '[Sextant] BLOCKED: No build review for task '$(basename $TASK_DIR)'. Run /sextant-verify first.'; exit 2; fi; if grep -q 'scope_creep_flags' "${TASK_DIR}build-summary.md" 2>/dev/null; then UNRESOLVED=$(python3 -c "import sys; content=open('${TASK_DIR}build-summary.md').read(); import re; flags=[l.strip() for l in re.findall(r'scope_creep_flags.*?\n(.*?)(?=\n#|\Z)', content, re.DOTALL)]; exit(0 if any(f and f != 'none' and f != '[]' for f in flags) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo yes || echo no); if [ "$UNRESOLVED" = "yes" ]; then echo '[Sextant] BLOCKED: Unresolved scope_creep_flags in build-summary.md. Resolve before committing.'; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; fi
